steps.title: Summarize the hypothesis
steps.content: The kelp highway hypothesis says humans first reached the Americas by sea, moving along Pacific islands and coastlines. The notes also explain that those coastal routes provided varied resources.

steps.title: Include the core claim
steps.content: Choice A gives only a resource detail. Choice B names the hypothesis but does not summarize it. Choice D describes later submersion, not the hypothesis itself. The best summary includes the sea route, island-and-coastline travel, and available resources. The answer is C.
